.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version constant to a newer release.
Fix a typo in the default download URL string where a space was incorrectly inserted before the file extension.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace a Javadoc-style comment block with a single-line comment for brevity.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: // set a default to use when no profile is configured.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logging to use a method that retrieves the logger based on the JoinPoint's declaring type, removing the class-level logger field.
Update log messages to remove the declaring type name since the logger is now scoped to the specific class, avoiding redundancy.
Reformat AspectJ pointcut annotations to use multi-line string concatenation for better readability.
Update the Javadoc reference to point to the new package location of JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: See {@link tech.jhipster.config.JHipsterProperties} for a good example.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the class description to reflect the specific application name.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: Properties specific to Jhipster Sample Application Vue.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor the class body to a single-line empty block for conciseness.
Refactor Ehcache configuration builder call to use a more readable multi-line format.
Change cache creation logic to clear existing cache instead of destroying and recreating it.
Add fields and setters for Git and Build properties to support prefixed cache keys.
Add a KeyGenerator bean using PrefixedKeyGenerator to ensure cache keys are unique across environments.
Update the login regex to enforce stricter validation rules, likely requiring an email format or a more specific set of allowed characters.
Rename the constant SYSTEM_ACCOUNT to SYSTEM for brevity or consistency with other parts of the codebase.
Remove the unused constant ANONYMOUS_USER from the Constants class.
Format the empty private constructor to use empty braces on the same line.
Remove the Jackson Afterburner module dependency and its bean configuration.
Add public visibility modifier to the problemModule bean method.
Add public visibility modifier to the constraintViolationProblemModule bean method.
Remove unused CacheManager dependency from the configuration class constructor.
Add configuration for new Liquibase properties supported in the updated library version.
Remove explicit bean name from @Bean annotation as it is no longer required or desired.
